title: Policy Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger policy design foundations judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Policy Design Foundations is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Policy Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good policy design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Policy Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
